title: pseudostellaria retusa
intro: Pseudostellaria retusa, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or mountain ginseng, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cognitive function. Pseudostellaria retusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
